description: You are an electrical engineering technician preparing a PCB board outline drawing for fabrication. Create a LibreCAD drawing with the following specifications, using millimeters with the board lower-left corner at the origin (0, 0): a 'Board_Outline' layer (White, index 7) containing a closed rectangle from (0, 0) to (100, 80) representing the board perimeter; a 'Mounting_Holes' layer (Red, index 1) containing four circles of 3.2 mm diameter (1.6 mm radius) centered at (5, 5), (95, 5), (5, 75), and (95, 75); and a 'Keepout_Zone' layer (Yellow, index
